extract: Cyndaquil (Japanese: ヒノアラシ Hinoarashi) is a Fire-type Pokémon introduced in Generation II. It evolves into Quilava starting at level 14, which evolves into Typhlosion starting at level 36. In Hisui, it evolves into Quilava starting at level 17, which evolves into Hisuian Typhlosion starting at level 36. Along with Chikorita and Totodile, Cyndaquil is one of the three first partner Pokémon of Johto available at the beginning of Pokémon Gold, Silver, Crystal, HeartGold, and SoulSilver. It is also one of the three first partner Pokémon of Hisui in Pokémon Legends: Arceus, alongside Rowlet and Oshawott.
